password_reset.title: Reset Password
password_reset.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
password_reset.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

password_reset_done.title: Check your email
password_reset_done.subtitle: We've sent a password reset link to your email address
password_reset_done.info: If an account exists for the email you entered, you will receive an email shortly with instructions on how to reset your password.

password_reset_key.title: Choose new password
password_reset_key.subtitle: Create a secure new password for your account
password_reset_key.password_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password_reset_key.invalid_desc: The password reset link was invalid, possibly because it has already been used or has expired. Please request a new one.

password_reset_key_done.title: Password Reset Complete
password_reset_key_done.subtitle: Your password has been changed successfully
password_reset_key_done.done_info: You can now log in using your new password.

workspace.revoke_modal_desc: Are you sure you want to revoke this invitation? The recipient will not be able to join using the link.
workspace.confirm_leave: Are you sure you want to leave this workspace?
workspace.confirm_remove: Are you sure you want to remove this member?

profile.timezone_desc: Used for aligning schedulers, logging auditing trails, and date formats.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to your dashboard to manage your SaaS
auth.register_subtitle: Start building your SaaS platform in minutes

mfa.list_subtitle: Protect your account by requiring an extra verification code at login
mfa.app_desc: Generate one-time verification codes using mobile applications like Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, or 1Password.
mfa.enable_subtitle: Secure your account using two-factor authentication
mfa.scan_qr_desc: Open your authenticator app (such as Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password) and scan the QR code below:
mfa.deactivate_subtitle: Are you sure you want to disable two-factor authentication?
mfa.deactivate_desc: Disabling two-factor authentication removes the extra security layer from your account. You will only need your email and password to sign in.
mfa.authenticate_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit verification code from your authenticator app to log in
mfa.deactivate_password_required: Password is required to confirm deactivation.
